incident_type: Credential compromise with suspected data access
detection_summary: Security operations confirmed a high-confidence credential misuse alert from the SIEM and escalated the incident to the on-call responder.
containment_actions: Isolated the affected workload from external network access.
Enabled additional monitoring for related accounts and services.
eradication_steps: Removed the malicious access path and rotated dependent secrets.
Patched the affected service and verified the vulnerable configuration was removed.
Reviewed access logs to confirm no remaining unauthorized sessions.
recovery_validation: Validated that monitoring remained operational after service restoration.
Completed a follow-up vulnerability scan with no blocking findings.
Confirmed the restored service met security configuration requirements.

internal_communication.summary: Stakeholders received containment status, customer impact assessment, and next-response milestones through the approved escalation channels.

lessons_learned: Credential rotation automation reduced containment time.
The incident report template now has a fully populated example artifact for responder training.
Additional validation should continue to verify that required evidence files remain present in the repository.
